name: agent-move
description: Watch your AI coding agents come alive as pixel-art characters in a 2D world

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @agent-move/server" "npm run dev -w @agent-move/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent-move/shared && npm run build -w @agent-move/server && npm run build -w @agent-move/client
